docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVANS, JANE ROCIO AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, A CALIFORNIA A NONPROFIT CORPORATION DBA SOLUTIONS SF JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
